changes.message: AI DMA determinism, RSP audio skip, reconnect-only resync
v0.21.0 — Agent's Version (#2)
v0.21.0 — Agent's Version (#2)
virtual gamepad overhaul + lockstep boot grace fix
pass game_id in share URLs so OG cards show game background
crash protection + frontend observability instrumentation
add observability — client event beacon, health check, admin errors tab
lobby landscape layout — scrollable with visible footer
revert lobby to fixed footer, hide in landscape instead
landscape layout overlap in lobby
set PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH so non-root user finds Chromium
switch Playwright OG generation to async API
safe storage fallback for privacy browsers (Brave mobile)
exempt /static/og/ from COEP, add og:image dimensions
custom error pages, HMAC upload tokens, CSP fix (#1)
warm up Playwright browser on startup for fast first OG image
finalize OG cards with Playwright HTML screenshots
switch OG image generation from Pillow to Playwright HTML screenshots
scale OG card fonts larger, fix version footer alignment
scale up OG card text, arcade-style copy, spectate player matchups
add homepage OG image and Playwright E2E tests
wire up OG card routes and COEP exemption
add OG image generation module
add Pillow dependency and OG card assets
